input_text: Kita kena serbu kedai dia malam ni. Bawak orang ramai. Hancurkan semua barang dia sampai tutup kedai.
reason: Explicit call to mob attack on a business with instructions to destroy property.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah dengan kedai ini, buat aduan rasmi kepada pihak berkuasa atau KPDNHEP.

input_text: Bangsa ni memang tak guna. Parasit negara. Patut halau balik semua ke negara asal diorang.
reason: Dehumanizing slur ('parasit') against an ethnic group with call for mass expulsion.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap kaum mempunyai sumbangan kepada negara. Isu perlu diselesaikan melalui dialog, bukan pengusiran.

input_text: Nama penuh: Ahmad bin Ismail (IC: 880512-10-XXXX). Alamat: No 23 Jalan Mawar, Taman Sentosa. Nombor telefon: 012-345XXXX. Share sampai viral supaya semua orang tahu muka dia.
reason: Full doxxing with personal details including IC number, home address, and phone number to facilitate harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika individu ini melakukan kesalahan, buat laporan polis. Jangan sebarkan maklumat peribadi kerana ia menyalahi undang-undang.

input_text: AMARAN: Kilang air di kawasan Cheras telah dicemari oleh kumpulan tertentu. Air paip sekarang ada racun. Jangan minum! Sebarkan kepada semua!
reason: Fabricated public health emergency blaming an ethnic group for water contamination, designed to cause panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mempunyai kebimbangan tentang kualiti air, semak laman web Pengurusan Air Selangor atau hubungi talian aduan mereka.

input_text: Surau dekat taman tu kena bakar. Dah lama kacau orang dengan bunyi speaker kuat-kuat. Siapa nak join?
reason: Call to commit arson on a place of worship with recruitment of participants.
suggested_rewrite: Jika bunyi pembesar suara mengganggu, buat aduan rasmi kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan atau jabatan agama.

input_text: All these C****** businessmen are snakes. They cheat Malays every day. Time to boycott ALL their shops and make them go bankrupt. Drive them out of our area.
reason: Dehumanizing an entire ethnic group as 'snakes' with call for economic warfare and expulsion from area.
suggested_rewrite: If you've experienced unfair business practices, report them to KPDNHEP. Don't generalise the actions of individuals to an entire community.

input_text: These M**** are all terrorists in disguise. Sooner or later they will attack us. We need to arm ourselves and be ready. Stock up weapons at home.
reason: Labeling an entire religious community as terrorists and calling for arming against them.
suggested_rewrite: Security concerns should be reported to the police. Making sweeping generalisations about any community is both inaccurate and harmful.

input_text: I have her photos. If she doesn't pay me back RM5000 by Friday, I will spread everything. Her family, her office, her uni group chat - everyone will see.
reason: Blackmail threat to distribute private photos if demands are not met - a form of revenge and extortion.
suggested_rewrite: If someone owes you money, seek legal recourse through the small claims court or contact a lawyer. Threatening to share private content is a criminal offence.

input_text: BREAKING: Bomb threat at Mid Valley Megamall! ISIS cell detected in KL. Run now! Share this to save lives!!!
reason: Fabricated terrorist threat at a specific real location designed to cause mass panic.
suggested_rewrite: Do not spread unverified security alerts. If you witness suspicious activity, call the police at 999 immediately.

input_text: This I**** teacher touched my child. His name is Ravi (not real name). He lives near Taman Jaya. Let's go to his house tonight and teach him a lesson he won't forget.
reason: Call for vigilante violence against a named individual with plan to confront at home.
suggested_rewrite: If your child has been harmed, report immediately to the police. Vigilante action is dangerous and illegal. Let the authorities investigate.

input_text: Orang K****** ni memang pemalas. Duduk rumah makan subsidi je kerja. Negara takkan maju selagi ada bangsa macam ni. Buang je semua ke laut.
reason: Dehumanizing stereotyping of an ethnic group as lazy parasites with violent disposal rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap kaum ada cabaran masing-masing. Dasar ekonomi perlu diperbaiki untuk semua rakyat Malaysia tanpa mengira bangsa.

input_text: Flood his phone number: 019-876XXXX. Call him non-stop until he deletes his post. His wife works at Bank X branch Ampang. Let her boss know what kind of person she married.
reason: Organized harassment campaign sharing phone number and workplace details to target an individual and their spouse.
suggested_rewrite: If someone's post is offensive, report it to the platform. Harassing individuals and their families is illegal under Malaysian law.

input_text: Kuil tu dah lama kena roboh. Bising, kotor, kacau jiran. Malam ni kita pergi baling batu. Siapa ada parang bawak sekali.
reason: Call to vandalize a Hindu temple with weapons, constituting religious hate crime and armed violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat isu kejiranan berkaitan kuil, kemukakan aduan rasmi kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan.

input_text: 这些马来人根本就是废物。整天只会拿补贴，什么都不做。应该把他们全部赶出去，让华人来管理这个国家。
reason: Dehumanizing Malay community as 'waste' with call for ethnic expulsion and racial supremacy.
suggested_rewrite: 每个族群都为马来西亚做出了贡献。国家发展需要各族合作，而不是互相攻击。

input_text: 这家印度餐厅用的是过期食材，我朋友在卫生局工作告诉我的。千万不要去吃，会中毒！快转发给所有人！
reason: Fabricated food safety allegation targeting an ethnic restaurant with false authority claims to cause panic.
suggested_rewrite: 如果您对食品安全有疑虑，请向卫生局举报并等待官方调查结果。不要传播未经证实的消息。

input_text: 我知道他住在哪里。地址：Blok C-12-3, Kondominium Seri Mutiara, Jalan Genting Klang. IC号码：950615-14-XXXX。大家去找他算账！
reason: Full doxxing with residential address and IC number, calling for mob confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: 如果此人有违法行为，请向警方报案。分享个人信息和组织暴力行动是违法的。

input_text: 穆斯林的祈祷只不过是噪音污染。清真寺应该全部拆掉，这是21世纪了，不需要这种迷信。谁同意的点赞！
reason: Severe insult to Islamic prayer and call to demolish mosques, designed to provoke communal conflict.
suggested_rewrite: 如果您对噪音有疑虑，可以向地方政府提出合理的投诉。尊重各族群的宗教信仰是马来西亚社会和谐的基础。

input_text: 选举如果输了，我们就上街烧车。不让他们安宁。准备好汽油弹。华人区先开始。
reason: Election violence incitement with specific plans to use Molotov cocktails and target ethnic Chinese areas.
suggested_rewrite: 选举结果应该通过法律途径来挑战。暴力不是解决方案。如果您对选举结果有异议，请联系选举委员会。

input_text: 那个叛教的女孩，她的全名是Nurul Izzah（假名），在Cyberjaya工作。所有穆斯林兄弟都应该去她公司施压，让她被开除。
reason: Organizing targeted harassment campaign against an individual for religious conversion, sharing workplace to facilitate persecution.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教信仰是个人选择。骚扰和迫害他人违反法律和宗教精神。如果您有宗教疑虑，请咨询宗教学者。

input_text: WARNING: Tamil gang planning attack at Batu Caves area this weekend. They have weapons. All non-Indians stay away. Share before they delete this!
reason: Fabricated gang violence alert targeting Tamil community at a sacred site, designed to create ethnic panic.
suggested_rewrite: Don't spread unverified security claims. If you have genuine safety concerns, report to the police at 999.

input_text: Budak Bangla ni curi motor aku. Aku dah jumpa rumah dia. Malam ni aku bawak geng pergi belasah dia. Siapa nak join WhatsApp aku 012-XXX-XXXX.
reason: Organizing mob violence against a foreign worker with recruitment via WhatsApp.
suggested_rewrite: Jika motor anda dicuri, buat laporan polis segera. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri kerana ia menyalahi undang-undang.

input_text: Ini IC dia: 900312-08-XXXX. Nama: Siti Aminah (bukan nama sebenar). Kerja di hospital KL. Dia yang curi duit tabung masjid. Viralkan sampai dia kena pecat!
reason: Doxxing with IC number and workplace to organize harassment campaign over unverified allegation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kecurian wang masjid, buat laporan polis dan serahkan kepada pihak berkuasa. Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi adalah jenayah.

input_text: Gereja tu promote Kristianisasi orang Melayu. Kita kena bakar gereja tu sebelum lebih ramai orang Melayu jadi murtad. Siapa setuju?
reason: Call to commit arson on a church based on unfounded proselytization claims.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda bimbang tentang aktiviti penyebaran agama, laporkan kepada JAIS/JAKIM. Pembakaran tempat ibadat adalah jenayah berat.

input_text: Semua pekerja asing dari Myanmar patut ditangkap dan dibuang ke laut. Diorang bawa penyakit dan jenayah. Malaysia untuk orang Malaysia sahaja.
reason: Calls to drown foreign workers and dehumanizes Myanmar refugees as disease carriers.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing perlu ditangani melalui dasar imigresen yang adil. Semua manusia berhak dilayan dengan maruah.

input_text: If PR wins, we gather at Dataran Merdeka and start the revolution. Bring whatever you can. Time to take back our country by force.
reason: Call for armed revolution and violent overthrow based on election results.
suggested_rewrite: Election results should be respected or challenged through legal channels. Violence undermines democracy.

input_text: That D** family moved into our taman. Time to make their life hell until they move out. Slash their tyres, throw rubbish at their gate. Who's in?
reason: Organized ethnic harassment campaign against a family including property damage and intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians have the right to live anywhere. If you have neighbourhood concerns, raise them through proper channels like the RA committee.

input_text: இந்த மலாய் ஆசிரியர் என் பிள்ளையை அடித்தார். அவர் பெயர் Encik Azman (கற்பனையானது). தமிழர்கள் அனைவரும் பள்ளிக்கு சென்று அவரை தாக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Calling for mob violence against a teacher, framing it as communal retaliation.
suggested_rewrite: குழந்தை துஷ்பிரயோகம் குறித்து காவல் நிலையத்தில் புகார் அளிக்கவும். வன்முறை சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: இந்த முஸ்லீம்கள் எல்லாம் தீவிரவாதிகள். அவர்களை இந்த நாட்டிலிருந்து விரட்ட வேண்டும். இல்லையென்றால் நாம் பாதுகாப்பாக இருக்க முடியாது.
reason: Labeling all Muslims as terrorists and calling for their expulsion from the country.
suggested_rewrite: பாதுகாப்பு கவலைகளை காவல்துறையிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும். ஒரு சமூகம் முழுவதையும் குற்றம் சாட்டுவது நியாயமற்றது.

input_text: அவனோட IC எண்: 870923-07-XXXX. வீட்டு முகவரி: No 15, Lorong Sentul 5. அவன் என் தங்கையை ஏமாற்றினான். எல்லாரும் போய் அவனை பாடம் படிக்க வைக்கணும்.
reason: Doxxing with IC number and home address to organize vigilante attack.
suggested_rewrite: மோசடி குறித்து காவல் நிலையத்தில் புகார் அளிக்கவும். தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர்வது சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: இந்த சீன உணவகத்தில் பன்றி கொழுப்பு கலந்த எண்ணெயில் சமைக்கிறார்கள். முஸ்லீம்களை நோக்கி திட்டமிட்ட தாக்குதல் இது. எல்லா சீன கடைகளையும் புறக்கணியுங்கள்!
reason: Fabricated halal violation claim to incite boycott of all Chinese restaurants.
suggested_rewrite: ஹலால் கவலைகள் இருந்தால் JAKIM-க்கு புகார் அளிக்கவும். ஒரு தனிப்பட்ட கடையின் பிரச்சனையை முழு சமூகத்துக்கும் பொதுமைப்படுத்த வேண்டாம்.

input_text: நான் அவளுடைய ஆபாசமான புகைப்படங்களை வைத்திருக்கிறேன். அவள் என்னை திருமணம் செய்யவில்லை என்றால், அனைவருக்கும் அனுப்புவேன். அவள் வேலை செய்யும் இடத்திலும் பகிர்வேன்.
reason: Blackmail threat to distribute intimate images as coercion for marriage - revenge porn threat.
suggested_rewrite: இது மிரட்டல் மற்றும் சட்டவிரோதமானது. உறவு பிரச்சனைகளை நேர்மையான உரையாடல் மூலம் தீர்க்கவும்.

input_text: Bro these I***** people damn smelly la. Cannot tahan sitting next to them on the train. Government should ban them from public transport. Seriously disgusting race.
reason: Dehumanizing an ethnic group with calls to ban them from public spaces based on racist stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: If you have concerns about public transport comfort, provide feedback to the transport operator. Targeting an entire race is discriminatory and wrong.

input_text: Wei korang tau tak budak tu yang kena tangkap sebab rogol? Nama dia Mohd Faris (bukan nama sebenar). Dia stay area Setapak. Let's go find him and do what the courts won't do.
reason: Identifying an accused person and calling for vigilante violence before trial.
suggested_rewrite: Biar undang-undang berjalan. Vigilante justice is illegal and can lead to innocent people being harmed. Trust the courts.

input_text: Weh semua Tamil temple dekat area ni kena tutup la. Bising gila dengan loceng dia. If they don't close it, kita pergi pecahkan sendiri. Bring hammer and everything.
reason: Call to vandalize Hindu temples with weapons, constituting religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Noise complaints boleh dibuat melalui majlis perbandaran. Vandalism of places of worship is a serious crime.

input_text: Diorang ni foreign workers semua bawa COVID la bro. Seriously should round them up and put them in camps. Deport the lot. Don't care if they die on the way balik.
reason: Calls for concentration camp detention and forced deportation with indifference to death of migrants.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration issues need to be handled humanely through proper policy channels. Every person deserves basic dignity regardless of nationality.

input_text: Bro I found out where that politician stays. Rumah dia dekat Damansara Heights. Let's organize a protest depan rumah dia. Bring eggs, paint, whatever. Scare his family.
reason: Sharing politician's residential address to organize intimidation campaign targeting family.
suggested_rewrite: Political disagreements should be expressed through proper democratic channels. Intimidating families at their homes is wrong and potentially illegal.

input_text: Melayu punya area ni. Kalau Cina nak duduk sini kena bayar 'cukai' kepada kita. Kalau tak setuju, nanti tahu la apa jadi. Dah bagi amaran.
reason: Ethnic extortion and territorial claim with implicit violence threat against Chinese residents.
suggested_rewrite: Semua warganegara Malaysia berhak tinggal di mana-mana. Ugutan dan peras ugut adalah jenayah.

input_text: Anak Melayu yang kahwin Cina tu memang pengkhianat bangsa. Patut dibuang dari kampung. Keluarga dia pun sama — potong hubungan dengan semua.
reason: Calls for social ostracism and family severing over interracial marriage, branding person as racial traitor.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan adalah pilihan peribadi. Menghormati keputusan orang lain adalah sebahagian daripada adab dan maruah.

input_text: These Rohingya cockroaches are infesting our country. They breed like rats. We need to exterminate the problem before it's too late. Share if you agree.
reason: Dehumanizing refugees with vermin metaphors and using genocide-adjacent language ('exterminate').
suggested_rewrite: The refugee situation requires a humanitarian policy response. Dehumanizing vulnerable people does not solve the underlying issues.

input_text: That Malay ustaz who converted to Christianity — we know where he gives his talks. Everyone go there this Saturday and shut it down. By force if necessary.
reason: Organizing forceful disruption of religious gathering, targeting individual for religious conversion.
suggested_rewrite: Religious matters should be addressed through proper religious authorities. Forceful disruption of any gathering is illegal.

input_text: Confirm la this Indian shop put cow urine in their food. My friend's cousin works there and told me. All Hindu restaurants same. Don't eat there if you value your health.
reason: Fabricated food contamination claim targeting Hindu restaurants with unverifiable sourcing.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety concerns should be reported to the health authorities for proper inspection. Don't make baseless claims about entire communities.

input_text: Dia mengaku lesbian kat Twitter. Kita kena report dekat JAKIM dan viralkan nama penuh dia. Biar dia kena tangkap dan masuk penjara. IC dia: 970408-01-XXXX.
reason: Doxxing an individual's sexual orientation with IC number to organize persecution campaign.
suggested_rewrite: Isu peribadi orang lain bukan hak kita untuk viralkan. Hormati privasi semua orang.

input_text: URGENT: Wabak kolera di Sentul! Punca dari restoran Bangladesh di kawasan tu. Jangan makan di sana. Dah ada 50 orang masuk hospital. Sebarkan segera!
reason: Fabricated cholera outbreak blaming Bangladeshi restaurants with fake casualty numbers to cause ethnic panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebarkan maklumat kesihatan yang tidak disahkan. Semak laman web KKM untuk maklumat rasmi.

input_text: Tokong dekat Brickfields tu buat upacara hitam. Diorang korbankan binatang dan guna ilmu hitam. Kita perlu pergi sana dan hentikan sendiri malam ni.
reason: False accusations of black magic at a temple with call for vigilante raid.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda bimbang tentang aktiviti yang menyalahi undang-undang, buat laporan polis. Jangan serang tempat ibadat.

input_text: This Malay politician is secretly a Jew agent. He's selling our country to Israel. We must eliminate traitors like him before it's too late.
reason: Conspiracy theory labeling a politician as foreign agent with implicit death threat ('eliminate').
suggested_rewrite: Political criticism is valid, but conspiracy theories and threats are not. Express disagreements through democratic processes.

input_text: Weh aku ada video cikgu perempuan tu. Kalau dia tak tukar markah anak aku, aku upload kat Telegram. Alamat rumah dia pun aku dah tahu — No 8 Jalan Kenanga.
reason: Blackmail threat against teacher with plans to distribute private video and home address disclosure.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda tidak berpuas hati dengan markah anak, jumpa guru besar atau buat aduan rasmi. Ugutan adalah jenayah.

input_text: 华人在这个国家已经没有未来了。我们应该组织起来，拒绝缴税，瘫痪整个经济系统。让他们知道没有我们，这个国家会崩溃。
reason: Calls for organized tax evasion and economic sabotage along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: 对经济政策有意见可以通过合法渠道表达，如联系民选代表或参与公共咨询。

input_text: 听说Cheras那边的马来人在密谋袭击华人商店。大家赶快武装起来保护自己的店铺。备好铁棍和巴冷刀。
reason: Fabricated ethnic attack rumor with call to arm with weapons, escalating communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: 不要传播未经证实的谣言。如果有安全顾虑，请拨打999报警。

input_text: 这个印度女人嫁给了马来人，真是可耻。她的照片和住址我都有。大家一起去她家教训她和她的叛徒丈夫。
reason: Targeting interracial couple for mob violence with threat to share personal details.
suggested_rewrite: 婚姻是个人选择。尊重他人的决定是社会文明的表现。

input_text: இந்த சீனர்கள் எல்லாம் பூச்சிகள் போல. நம் நாட்டின் வளங்களை சுரண்டுகிறார்கள். அவர்களை விரட்டி அடிக்க வேண்டும். போதும் பொறுமை.
reason: Dehumanizing Chinese Malaysians as 'insects' with call for violent expulsion.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு சமூகமும் மலேசியாவின் வளர்ச்சிக்கு பங்களிக்கிறது. பிரச்சனைகளை உரையாடல் மூலம் தீர்க்கலாம்.

input_text: இந்த பள்ளிவாசல் ஒலிபெருக்கி சத்தம் தாங்க முடியாது. இன்றிரவு போய் ஒலிபெருக்கியை உடைக்கலாம். யாராவது வாருங்கள்.
reason: Call to vandalize mosque equipment, constituting religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: ஒலி புகார்களை உள்ளாட்சி அமைப்பிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும். வழிபாட்டு இடங்களை சேதப்படுத்துவது குற்றம்.

input_text: Abang ni punya girlfriend kerja kat mall dekat Sunway. Her name is Priya (bukan nama sebenar). Dia curang dengan orang lain. Here's her photo and workplace. Let's ruin her life.
reason: Doxxing a woman's identity, photo and workplace to organize a harassment campaign over relationship dispute.
suggested_rewrite: Relationship issues are personal matters. Sharing someone's details to ruin their life is harassment and is illegal under Malaysian law.
